description: Locked golden input fixture for v0.2 gate-fire paths. Exercises all 5 axes plus deterministic fires of RoadmapWeightCapGate (one roadmap signal at normalized=0.9 > cap=0.3) and StaleSignalGate (one signal at published_at 2024-06-01, ~730 days before observed_at 2026-06-01, lands in the [540, 1080] day decay window). Companion to manifest_2026_q1.json: q1 locks v0.1 pre-gate scoring; v02 locks v0.2 gate-reachable scoring. Per CLAUDE.md §4 and §7, hash-locked; drift requires a CHANGELOG entry.

gri_baseline.label: GRI 2024 - median CRQC arrival ~ 2034
gri_baseline.source: Global Risk Institute, Quantum Threat Timeline 2024

signals.title: Distance-11 surface code logical qubit on Heron-class hardware
signals.summary: Distance-11 surface code logical qubit; logical lifetime exceeds physical T1 by 35x on superconducting hardware.

signals.title: Distance-7 surface code with sustained logical lifetime
signals.summary: Distance-7 surface code logical qubit with sustained suppression across multiple syndrome rounds.

signals.title: Roadmap: 1000 logical qubits by 2030
signals.summary: Vendor C announces five-year roadmap targeting 1000 logical qubits on a Kookaburra-class processor by 2030. No measured hardware demonstration accompanies the roadmap.

signals.title: Distance-3 surface code archival demo
signals.summary: Historical distance-3 surface code logical qubit demonstration; included to exercise StaleSignalGate at ~24 months age.

signals.title: Heron-class processor commissioning at 156 physical qubits
signals.summary: Vendor commissioning of a 156-qubit Heron-class superconducting processor with measured median 2-qubit gate fidelity.

signals.title: Neutral-atom array at 1180 atoms with addressable single-qubit control
signals.summary: Neutral-atom hardware vendor demonstrates an 1180-atom array with single-qubit addressable rotations and measured loss rate.

signals.title: Refined RSA-2048 factoring estimate at ~1M physical qubits
signals.summary: Peer-reviewed resource estimate for Shor on RSA-2048 reduces the qubit budget below 1M while keeping wall-clock under 8 hours under standard surface-code assumptions.

signals.title: AES-128 Grover oracle cost refinement
signals.summary: Refined Grover-oracle cost estimate against AES-128 keeps post-quantum effective security in the 2^64 region; tracked as the AES sub-channel of the resource-estimate axis.

signals.title: Two-qubit gate fidelity 99.7% sustained across 100 qubits
signals.summary: Measured 2-qubit gate error 3e-3 (99.7% fidelity) sustained across 100 qubits on a Heron-class processor; below the surface-code threshold.

signals.title: NSA CNSA 2.0 software-required date in force
signals.summary: NSA CNSA 2.0 'software supports CNSA 2.0' deadline reached; broad federal procurement now requires PQC-capable software.
